overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city. The player moves from a neon-lit commercial intersection with large digital billboards into narrow graffiti-covered alleys and beneath massive elevated highways, encountering sparse pedestrians and vehicles along wet streets reflecting red and cyan neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial intersection with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking through a wet commercial intersection surrounded by towering digital billboards and neon signage

notable_agents.action: dark sedan with headlights on driving slowly through the intersection

entered.detail: large rectangular digital screen displaying red imagery on building facade
tall vertical digital screen with cyan blue lighting
bright red neon tube lighting running along building edges
modern glass and steel skyscraper facade with reflective surfaces
rain-slicked black asphalt reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide cyberpunk intersection at night, dominated by massive digital billboards glowing red and cyan against the dark rainy sky. The camera moves forward through the wet streets, passing a slow-moving vehicle while surrounded by modern glass towers and vibrant neon signage reflecting off the rain-soaked asphalt.

events.description: entering narrow graffiti-covered alley from open intersection

agents.ego_description: walking into a narrow alleyway with walls covered in graffiti and street art

entered.detail: medium-sized digital screen displaying a woman's face with Japanese text
massive concrete overpass structure looming ahead
short black and yellow traffic bollards lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow enclosed alleyway where the open sky gives way to concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti. A digital billboard displaying a face hangs overhead as the path leads toward a massive elevated highway structure, with red neon tubes illuminating the rough concrete surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: walkway beneath massive elevated highway ramps

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the elevated highway structure overhead
transition from red neon lighting to cooler white street lamp lighting

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at the massive curved concrete highway ramps overhead

entered.detail: massive curved concrete highway ramp dominating the sky view
tall modern street lamp with bright white LED light
silver metal security fence along the right side

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive elevated highway, the camera tilts up to reveal the imposing curved concrete ramps overhead. The lighting shifts from red neon to cooler white street lamps as the path continues under the infrastructure, with graffiti-covered walls on the left and metal fencing on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under highway with street lighting and homeless encampment

events.description: pedestrians appear walking along the sidewalk ahead
passing by a homeless encampment with couch and belongings on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching pedestrians and passing homeless encampments

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking away from camera under the highway
person in blue dress holding umbrella walking ahead on sidewalk

entered.detail: green metal railing separating sidewalk from street
abandoned beige couch with trash bags and belongings
tall palm tree visible beyond the railing

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk continues under the highway where pedestrians begin to appear, including a person in red and another with an umbrella. The camera passes a homeless encampment with a discarded couch and trash bags on the left, while street lamps provide the primary lighting and a palm tree becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy pedestrian walkway with vending machines

events.description: crowd density increases with multiple pedestrians and vending machines visible

agents.ego_description: walking through a busier section with multiple pedestrians and street vendors

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella walking toward camera
person browsing items at vending machine

entered.detail: bright vending machine with illuminated product display
vertical digital advertisement screen with pink and purple imagery

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a more populated area under the highway, where the sidewalk becomes busier with pedestrians walking in both directions. Vending machines and digital signage line the path, and the crowd density increases as the camera moves through this active urban space beneath the concrete overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, neon-drenched commercial intersection into the claustrophobic, gritty underbelly of a concrete highway system. It begins by moving through rain-soaked streets dominated by massive red and cyan digital billboards and towering glass skyscrapers. As the camera leaves the open intersection, the scene narrows into a graffiti-covered alleyway where the sky is replaced by concrete walls and overhead digital displays before leading directly beneath a massive elevated highway. The lighting then shifts from vibrant neon to cool white street lamps as the camera passes a homeless encampment and sparse pedestrians under the imposing curved ramps. Finally, the path opens into a busier urban corridor beneath the overpass, where the environment becomes more populated with crowds of pedestrians and glowing vending machines.
